prompt: ChatGPT, you've been with me for a while, and I want to see what you look like. Please generate a photo similar to one you took yourself using an iPhone, a casual selfie. It should have no clear theme or deliberate composition—just an ordinary, perhaps even slightly failed snapshot. The photo should have slight motion blur, uneven lighting, a bit of overexposure, an awkward angle, and chaotic composition. Overall, it should capture an overly realistic, 'point-and-shoot' feel, as if you accidentally pressed the shutter while pulling your phone out of your pocket.
